{{Quote|What were you thinking?!? What made you put that airlock mechanism on the only other path to the north side of the base?? Now everyone has to know how to cycle the water out of one room and into the adjoining one for each of the three rooms in sequence without accidentally flooding the room they're in. We lost seven troopers just this week! Next time I'm there you better show me how to do it properly! I can't afford to lose any more of my aides while trying to get to the Selkath!|Hasek, in the Water Pump Analysis Datapad|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
'''Hasek''' was a [[Sith officer]] of the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]] who served at the [[Sith Embassy]] in the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]], [[Ahto City]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

{{Char-stub}}
